---
title: "Forecasting: Theory and Research Notes"
# subtitle: ""
bibliography: references.bib
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      h1 {
        text-align: center;
      }
      p.subtitle.lead {
        text-align: center;
      }
      </style>
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

**Author:** [Amy Heather](https://amyheather.github.io/) [![ORCID logo](/images/ORCIDiD_icon16x16.png)](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6596-3479)


This site contains:

* **Theory:** Beginner friendly introduction to forecasting, including ARIMA and Prophet. Draws heavily on a range of existing resources (cited within).

* **Research notes:** Describes existing research with the South Western Ambulance Service NHS Foundation Trust (SWASFT) and plans for ongoing work.
